calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Morelli Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per
Joshua Goltz Defendant/Appellant in Pro Per via Zoom

All parties are sworn.

Defendant/Appellant Joshua Goltz testifies on his own behalf.
Plaintiff/Respondent Michael Morelli testifies on his own behalf.

The Court asks clarifying questions.

Defendant/Appellant Joshua Goltz testifies on his own behalf in response to opposing party.

At the close of the hearing, the Court rules as follows:

The Court affirms the judgment. The award amount is $400 with $80 in costs to Plaintiff/Respondent.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).
